acoustics.name: Acoustics
acoustics.description: Precise control of the audio spectrum allows Duplicants to get funky.

advanced_automation.name: Advanced Automation
advanced_automation.description: The only limit to colony automation is my own imagination.
advanced_automation.summary: Advanced Automation research unlocks the basic Automation gates.
advanced_automation.unlocks: AND Gate, OR Gate, BUFFER Gate, FILTER Gate

advanced_caffeination.name: Advanced Caffeination
advanced_caffeination.description: Let Duplicants relax after a long day of subterranean digging with a shot of warm beanjuice.
advanced_caffeination.unlocksSO: Espresso Machine, Large Liquid Fuel Tank, Mercury Ceiling Light

advanced_chiselwork.name: Advanced Chiselwork
advanced_chiselwork.description: Methods for working with high quality art materials.
advanced_chiselwork.unlocks: Aero Pot, Window Tile, Marble Block, Metal Block

advanced_combustion.name: Advanced Combustion
advanced_combustion.unlocks: Sugar Engine, Small Solid Oxidizer Tank

advanced_gas_flow.name: Advanced Gas Flow
advanced_gas_flow.description: Gas Enginges and transportation for rockets.
advanced_gas_flow.summary: research unlocks Buildings related to rockets and gas management in the Spaced Out DLC.
advanced_gas_flow.unlocks: Carbon Dioxide Engine, Gas Rocket Port Loader, Gas Rocket Port Unloader, Gas Cargo Canister

advanced_power_regulation.name: Advanced Power Regulation
advanced_power_regulation.description: Circuit components required for large scale Power management.
advanced_power_regulation.summary: Advanced Power Regulation research unlocks several Power buildings used for circuits that require more wattage.
advanced_power_regulation.unlocks: Heavi-Watt Wire, Heavi-Watt Joint Plate, Hydrogen Generator, Power Shutoff, Power Transformer, Wattage Sensor

advanced_research.name: Advanced Research
advanced_research.description: Advanced Research is the second tier of research points used in research. Advanced Research is required for all tier 3 and higher research categories.

advanced_research_research.name: Advanced Research
advanced_research_research.description: The tools my colony needs to conduct more advanced, in-depth research.
advanced_research_research.summary: Advanced Research allows the construction of a Super Computer, which in turn allows for the production of Advanced Research required for all tier 3 and higher research.
advanced_research_research.unlocks: Advanced Research=Advanced Research=Advanced Research Capability, Super Computer, Skill Scrubber, Soldering Station
advanced_research_research.unlocksSO: Advanced Research=Advanced Research=Advanced Research Capability, Super Computer, Skill Scrubber, Telescope (Spaced Out), Mini-Pod, Soldering Station

agriculture_research.name: Agriculture (Research)
agriculture_research.description: Master the agricultural art of crop raising.
agriculture_research.summary: Agriculture research unlocks three new components for farming using the Hydroponic Farm as well as the key component for a Natural Gas Generator, the Fertilizer Synthesizer. Additionally, it grants access to the Refrigerator, a building that consumes power to slow down spoiling of food inside.
agriculture_research.unlocks: Farm Station, Fertilizer Synthesizer, Refrigerator, Hydroponic Farm, Park Sign, Wall Planter, Wide Hydroponic Farm
agriculture_research.unlocksSO: Farm Station, Fertilizer Synthesizer, Refrigerator, Hydroponic Farm, Park Sign, Wall Planter, Wide Hydroponic Farm, Radiation Lamp

air_systems.name: Air Systems
air_systems.description: Maintain clean, breathable air in the colony.
air_systems.summary: Air Systems research unlocks advanced methods of oxygen production.

animal_control.name: Animal Control
animal_control.description: Useful techniques to manage critter populations in the colony.
animal_control.summary: Animal Control research unlocks the Incubator, which allows quick hatching of Critters, the Critter Sensor, which enables Stable automation, and two types of traps for capturing critters passively.
animal_control.unlocks: Airborne Critter Trap, Critter Trap, Fish Trap, Incubator, Critter Sensor, Aquatic Grooming Station, Aquatic Shearing Station

applied_sciences_research.name: Applied Sciences Research
applied_sciences_research.description: Applied Sciences Research is the tertiary tier of research points used in Spaced Out! along with Data Analysis Research. Materials Science Research is required for all tier 5 and higher research categories.

artificial_friends.name: Artificial Friends
artificial_friends.unlocksSO: Sweepy Dock, Rover's Module, Flydo=Flydo=Flydo Pattern

artistic_expression.name: Artistic Expression
artistic_expression.description: Majorly improve Decor by giving Duplicants the tools of artistic and emotional expression.
artistic_expression.summary: research unlocks additional Decor-boosting buildings, including additional forms of Plant pots, plus several types of buildings which provide decor with no upkeep costs (such as Ceiling Trim and Corner Trim). The Pedestal can be used to turn almost any kind of Solid resource into a decor provider, while the Sculpting Block and Ice Block can provide additional decor after being worked by a Duplicant.
artistic_expression.unlocks: Wicker Door, Wall Pot, Hanging Pot, Corner Trim, Ceiling Trim, Pedestal, Sculpting Block, Ice Block

atomic_research.name: Atomic Research
atomic_research.description: Atomic Research was the fourth tier of Research points before it was reworked into Materials Science Research. It was necessary to unlock more advanced structures.

basic_farming.name: Basic Farming
basic_farming.description: Learn the introductory principles of Plant domestication.
basic_farming.summary: Basic farming allows for basic domestication of plants using the Planter Box, and grants access to early-game Carbon Dioxide recycling with the Algae Terrarium. Additionally, it permits access to the construction of additional Ration Boxes and allows the proper disposal of with Compost.
basic_farming.unlocks: Algae Terrarium, Planter Box, Ration Box, Compost

bioengineering.name: Bioengineering
bioengineering.summary: Bioengineering is a Spaced Out! exclusive research that opens the way to use mutated plants on your farms.

brackene_flow.name: Brackene Flow
brackene_flow.description: Advanced production, processing and distribution of this fluid resource.
brackene_flow.unlocks: Critter Fountain, Brackwax Gleaner, Milking Station, Aquatic Critter Fountain, Aquatic Milking Station

brute_force_refinement.name: Brute-Force Refinement
brute_force_refinement.description: Low-tech refinement methods for producing clay and renewable sources of sand.
brute_force_refinement.summary: Brute-Force Refinement research unlocks the Kiln and Rock Crusher.

catalytics.name: Catalytics
catalytics.unlocks: Oxylite Refinery, Bleach Stone Hopper, Molecular Forge, Soda Fountain, Advanced Chemical Production
catalytics.unlocksSO: Oxylite Refinery, Bleach Stone Hopper, Molecular Forge, Soda Fountain, Large Gas Cargo Canister, Advanced Chemical Production

celestial_detection.name: Celestial Detection
celestial_detection.description: Turn Duplicants' eyes to the skies and discover what undiscovered wonders await out there.
celestial_detection.summary: Celestial Detection is an important research towards Rocketry and unlocks the Space Scanner, which is used to detect incoming Rockets and Meteor Showers, and a Telescope, which is needed to look at the Starmap and detect destinations.

computing.name: Computing
computing.description: Virtually extend the boundaries of Duplicant imagination.
computing.summary: Computing unlocks advanced Automation gates, as well as the Virtual Planetarium, which is required for Interstellar Research in the base game, the Duplicant checkpoint, which allows/disallows areas, and the Arcade Cabinet, a recreational building.
computing.unlocks: Signal Counter, Memory Toggle, XOR Gate, Arcade Cabinet, Duplicant Checkpoint, Virtual Planetarium
computing.unlocksSO: Signal Counter, Memory Toggle, XOR Gate, Arcade Cabinet, Duplicant Checkpoint

crash_plan.name: Crash Plan
crash_plan.description: What goes up, must come down.
crash_plan.unlocks: Orbital Research=Data Analysis Research=Data Analysis Research= Capability, Trailblazer Module, Orbital Data Collection Lab, Virtual Planetarium

creature_comforts.name: Creature Comforts
creature_comforts.description: Strategies for maximizing critters' quality of life.
creature_comforts.unlocks: Critter Condo, Aquatic Critter Condo, Airborne Critter Condo

cryofuel_combustion.name: Cryofuel Combustion
cryofuel_combustion.description: With this technology, the sky is your oyster. Go exploring!

cryofuel_propulsion.name: Cryofuel Propulsion
cryofuel_propulsion.description: A semi-powerful engine to propel you further into the galaxy.
cryofuel_propulsion.summary: Cryofuel Propulsion Research unlocks Hydrogen Engine which can send rockets further into space.
cryofuel_propulsion.unlocks: Hydrogen Engine (Spaced Out), Liquid Oxidizer Tank (Spaced Out)

data_analysis_research.name: Data Analysis Research
data_analysis_research.description: Data Analysis Research is a tertiary tier of Research points. It is required for all tier 6 and higher research categories.

data_science.name: Data Science
data_science.description: The science of making the data work for my Duplicants, instead of the other way around.
data_science.unlocks: Data Miner, Remote Controller, Remote Worker Dock, Robo-Pilot Capsule
data_science.unlocksSO: Data Miner, Remote Controller, Remote Worker Dock

decontamination.name: Decontamination
decontamination.description: Instruments to help reduce Germ spread within the base.
decontamination.summary: Decontamination research unlocks Buildings related to decontaminating your Colony.
decontamination.unlocks: Deodorizer, Carbon Skimmer, Mechanized Airlock, Breathing Station

distillation.name: Distillation
distillation.description: Distill difficult mixtures down to their most useful parts.
distillation.summary: Distillation research unlocks the distillers and Water Sieve.
distillation.unlocks: Algae Distiller, Ethanol Distiller, Water Sieve

durable_life_support.name: Durable Life Support
durable_life_support.description: Improved devices for extended missions into space.
durable_life_support.summary: Durable List Support is Spaced Out! only research opening the way to more ambitious space missions and artifact collecting.
durable_life_support.unlocks: Basic Nosecone, Spacefarer Module, Artifact Analysis Station, Artifact Transport Module, Critter Cargo Bay

employment.name: Employment
employment.description: Exchange the skill points earned by Duplicants for new traits and abilities.
employment.unlocks: Water Cooler, Crafting Station, Metal Power Bank=Metal Power Bank=Metal Power Bank Pettern, Wood Heater

environmental_appreciation.name: Environmental Appreciation
environmental_appreciation.description: Improve Morale by lazing around in Light with a high level Lux value.

filtration.name: Filtration
filtration.description: Basic Technologies for filtering Liquids and Gases.
filtration.unlocks: Gas Filter, Liquid Filter, Lubrication Station
filtration.unlocksSO: Gas Filter, Liquid Filter, Sludge Press, Lubrication Station

fine_art.name: Fine Art
fine_art.description: Broader options for artistic Decor improvements.
fine_art.summary: research unlocks new buildings which provide Decor bonuses, which can be transformed by Duplicants possessing Decorating skills to boost their decor further (depending on skill level).
fine_art.unlocks: Blank Canvas, Large Sculpting Block, Display Shelf

flow_redirection.name: Flow Redirection
flow_redirection.description: Balance on irrigated concave platforms for a Morale boost.
flow_redirection.unlocksSO: Bottle Filler, Mechanical Surfboard, Liquid Rocket Port Loader, Liquid Rocket Port Unloader, Liquid Cargo Tank (Spaced Out)

food_repurposing.name: Food Repurposing
food_repurposing.description: Blend that leftover Food into a Morale boosting slurry.
food_repurposing.unlocks: Juicer, Spice Grinder, Plant Pulverizer, Smoker

fossil_fuels.name: Fossil Fuels
fossil_fuels.description: Burn dirty fuels for exceptional Power production.
fossil_fuels.summary: Fossil Fuels research unlocks several buildings related to the usage of Crude Oil.
fossil_fuels.unlocks: Natural Gas Generator, Oil Refinery, Petroleum Generator

gas_distribution.name: Gas Distribution
gas_distribution.description: Design building hookups to get Gas resources circulating properly.
gas_distribution.unlocksSO: Canister Drainer, Gas Intake Fitting, Gas Output Fitting, Large Solid Oxidizer Tank

generic_sensors.name: Generic Sensors
generic_sensors.description: Drive automation in a variety of new, inventive ways.
generic_sensors.summary: Generic Sensors research unlocks sensors used in Automation.
generic_sensors.unlocks: Weight Plate, Gas Element Sensor, Liquid Element Sensor, NOT Gate, Cycle Sensor, Timer Sensor, Light Sensor
generic_sensors.unlocksSO: Weight Plate, Gas Element Sensor, Liquid Element Sensor, NOT Gate, Cycle Sensor, Timer Sensor, Light Sensor, Starmap Location Sensor

glass_blowing.name: Glass Blowing
glass_blowing.description: The decorative benefits of glass are both apparent and transparent.
glass_blowing.unlocks: Window Tile, Aero Pot, Sun Lamp, Glass Backwall, Glass Jelly Ceiling Light

gourmet_meal_preparation.name: Gourmet Meal Preparation
gourmet_meal_preparation.description: Raise colony Morale by cooking the most delicious, high quality Foods.
gourmet_meal_preparation.summary: Gourmet Meal Preparation unlocks the Gas Range, which enables Duplicants to cook food with food qualities ranging from +4 (Great) to +6 (Ambrosial). Note that the Gas Range requires Natural Gas.
gourmet_meal_preparation.unlocks: Gas Range, Dehydrator, Rehydrator, Deep Fryer, Sushi Bar

hazard_protection.name: Hazard Protection
hazard_protection.description: Vital gear for surviving in extreme conditions and environments.
hazard_protection.unlocks: Exosuit Overlay Icon=Exosuit Overlay, Atmo Suit=Atmo Suit=Atmo Suit= Pattern, Exosuit Forge, Atmo Suit Checkpoint, Atmo Suit Dock

healthcare.name: Healthcare
healthcare.description: Prevent injury and Disease from running rampant in the colony.
healthcare.summary: Healthcare research unlocks two Medical Buildings.
healthcare.unlocks: Gas Pipe Germ Sensor, Liquid Pipe Germ Sensor, Hand Sanitizer, Disease Clinic=Disease Clinic=Pharma Chamber

high_culture.name: High Culture
high_culture.description: New methods for working with extremely high quality art materials.
high_culture.summary: research unlocks new buildings which provide Decor bonuses, which can be transformed by Duplicants possessing Decorating skills to boost their decor further (depending on skill level). These buildings also inherently provide more decor than their equivalents from prior research tiers.
high_culture.unlocks: Landscape Canvas, Metal Block, Wood Block

high_velocity_destruction.name: High Velocity Destruction
high_velocity_destruction.summary: High Velocity Destruction Research unlocks Drillcone to mine material from space POI.

high_velocity_transport.name: High Velocity Transport
high_velocity_transport.summary: High Velocity Transport Research unlocks Interplanetary Launcher to send Interplanetary Payloads and Targeting Beacon to receive it.

home_luxuries.name: Home Luxuries
home_luxuries.description: Luxury amenities for advanced Stress reduction.
home_luxuries.unlocks: Comfy Bed, Plastic Ladder, Plastic Tile, Clothing Refashionator, Communal Table, Wood Tile

hvac.name: HVAC
hvac.description: Regulate Temperature in the colony for Plant cultivation and Duplicant comfort.
hvac.summary: HVAC research unlocks buildings for Gas-based temperature management.
hvac.unlocks: Thermo Regulator, Thermo Sensor, Gas Pipe Thermo Sensor, Gas Pipe Element Sensor, Radiant Gas Pipe, Gas Reservoir, Gas Meter Valve

hydrocarbon_combustion.name: Hydrocarbon Combustion
hydrocarbon_combustion.description: Delve deeper into the vastness of space than ever before.
hydrocarbon_combustion.unlocks: Petroleum Engine, Biodiesel Engine, Liquid Fuel Tank, Solid Oxidizer Tank

hydrocarbon_propulsion.name: Hydrocarbon Propulsion
hydrocarbon_propulsion.description: Low-range rocket engines with lots of smoke.
hydrocarbon_propulsion.summary: Hydrocarbon Propulsion research unlocks Mission Control Station and Small Petroleum Engine, which burns petroleum as rocket fuel.
hydrocarbon_propulsion.unlocks: Small Petroleum Engine, Mission Control Station

improved_hydrocarbon_propulsion.name: Improved Hydrocarbon Propulsion
improved_hydrocarbon_propulsion.description: Mid-range rocket engines with lots of smoke.
improved_hydrocarbon_propulsion.summary: Improved Hydrocarbon Propulsion research unlocks Petroleum Engine and Biodiesel Engine, which are bigger, and therefore have a longer range, than previously unlocked Small Petroleum Engine.
improved_hydrocarbon_propulsion.unlocks: Petroleum Engine (Spaced Out), Biodiesel Engine=Biodiesel Engine (Spaced Out)

improved_plumbing.name: Improved Plumbing
improved_plumbing.description: Liquid infrastructure capable of withstanding more intense conditions, such as Heat and pressure
improved_plumbing.summary: Improved Plumbing research unlocks Buildings useful for improving Plumbing systems.
improved_plumbing.unlocks: Insulated Liquid Pipe, Hydro Sensor, Liquid Shutoff, Liquid Reservoir, Plastic Gasket=Gasket=Gasket Pattern

improved_ventilation.name: Improved Ventilation
improved_ventilation.description: Gas infrastructure capable of withstanding more intense conditions, such as Heat and pressure.
improved_ventilation.unlocks: Insulated Gas Pipe, Atmo Sensor, Gas Shutoff, High Pressure Gas Vent

interior_decor.name: Interior Decor
interior_decor.description: Decor boosting items to counteract the gloom of underground living.
interior_decor.summary: Interior Decor Research unlocks Buildings that improve Decor.

internal_combustion.name: Internal Combustion
internal_combustion.description: Fuel-powered generators for crude yet powerful Power production.
internal_combustion.summary: research unlocks Coal Generator and Wood Burner that run on Coal and Wood separately. It also unlocks the Peat Burner with The Prehistoric Planet Pack DLC installed.
internal_combustion.unlocks: Coal Generator, Wood Burner, Peat Burner, Tidal Turbine

interstellar_research.name: Interstellar Research
interstellar_research.description: Interstellar Research is the third tier of Research points. Interstellar Research is necessary to unlock Rocketry structures more advanced than Steam Engine Rocket. Interstellar Research Points are obtainable by a Duplicant with Astronomy Skill to research at Virtual Planetarium, which consumes Data Banks collected with Research Modules from successful Space Missions.

introductory_rocketry.name: Introductory Rocketry
introductory_rocketry.description: Everything required for launching the colony's very first space program.
introductory_rocketry.summary: Introductory Rocketry Research is the fundamental turning point for the game, granting access to rockets and inter-planetary travel.
introductory_rocketry.unlocks: Command Capsule, Steam Engine, Research Module, Gantry

liquid_and_gas_cargo.name: Liquid and Gas Cargo
liquid_and_gas_cargo.description: Extract precious liquids and gases from the far reaches of space, and return with them to the colony.
liquid_and_gas_cargo.unlocks: Liquid Cargo Tank, Gas Cargo Canister

liquid_distribution.name: Liquid Distribution
liquid_distribution.description: Advanced fittings ensure that Liquid resources get where they need to go.
liquid_distribution.summary: Liquid Distribution research can help automate liquid shipping tasks.
liquid_distribution.unlocksSO: Bottle Drainer, Liquid Intake Fitting, Liquid Output Fitting, Wall Toilet

liquid_tuning.name: Liquid Tuning
liquid_tuning.description: Easily manipulate Liquid Heat with these temperature regulating technologies.
liquid_tuning.summary: Liquid Tuning research unlocks Buildings for adjusting Liquid temperature.
liquid_tuning.unlocks: Radiant Liquid Pipe, Thermo Aquatuner, Liquid Pipe Thermo Sensor, Liquid Pipe Element Sensor, Liquid Tepidizer, Liquid Meter Valve, Conduction Panel, Rubber Tile

liquid_based_refinement_processes.name: Liquid-Based Refinement Processes
liquid_based_refinement_processes.description: Use pumped Liquids to filter out unwanted elements.
liquid_based_refinement_processes.summary: Liquid-Based Refinement Processes Research unlocks the Desalinator and the Ore Scrubber.

low_resistance_conductors.name: Low-Resistance Conductors
low_resistance_conductors.description: Pure-core wires that can handle more Electrical current without overloading.
low_resistance_conductors.summary: Low-Resistance Conductors research unlocks conductive wiring.
low_resistance_conductors.unlocks: Conductive Wire, Conductive Wire Bridge, Heavi-Watt Conductive Wire, Heavi-Watt Conductive Joint Plate, Large Power Transformer, Large Discharger

materials_science_research.name: Materials Science Research
materials_science_research.description: Harness sub-atomic particles to study the properties of matter.
materials_science_research.unlocks: Materials Science Research=Applied Sciences Research=Applied Sciences Research= Capability, Materials Study Terminal, Manual Radbolt Generator, Uranium Ore Power Bank=Uranium Ore Power Bank=Uranium Ore Power Bank= Pattern

meal_preparation.name: Meal Preparation
meal_preparation.description: Prepare more nutritious Food and store it longer before spoiling.
meal_preparation.summary: Meal Preparation allows for more Cooking recipes with the Electric Grill, as well as providing Duplicants somewhere to eat with the Mess Table. It also provides access to the Farm Tile, an upgrade of the Planter Box.
meal_preparation.unlocks: Electric Grill, Egg Cracker, Mess Table, Farm Tile

medical_equipment.name: Medical Equipment
medical_equipment.description: The basic necessities doctors need to facilitate patient care.

medical_research.name: Medical Research
medical_research.description: Basic medical knowledge to light the common Diseases that plague Duplicants.

micro_targeted_medicine.name: Micro-Targeted Medicine
micro_targeted_medicine.description: State of the art equipment to conquer the most stubborn of illnesses.
micro_targeted_medicine.unlocksSO: Disease Clinic, Hot Tub, Radiation Sensor

missiles.name: Missiles
missiles.description: Craft explosives and fire them into outer space.

monuments.name: Monuments
monuments.unlocks: Monument Base, Monument Midsection, Monument Top

more_materials_science_research.name: More Materials Science Research
more_materials_science_research.description: Harness sub-atomic particles to study the properties of matter even more.
more_materials_science_research.summary: More Materials Science Research is Spaced Out! exclusive research unlocking an alternative way of generating Radbolts and a better way of controlling them.
more_materials_science_research.unlocks: Radbolt Generator, Radbolt Reflector, Radbolt Joint Plate

multiplexing.name: Multiplexing
multiplexing.description: More choices for Automation signal distribution.
multiplexing.summary: Multiplexing unlocks the final two pieces of Automation, allowing for more advanced routing of signals.

new_media.name: New Media
new_media.description: High tech displays with lots of pretty colors.
new_media.summary: research unlocks the Pixel Pack, a useful Decor-providing building which can also display a visual representation of the signals carried on a connected Automation Wire or Automation Ribbon.

notification_systems.name: Notification Systems
notification_systems.description: Get all the news you need to know about your complex colony.
notification_systems.unlocksSO: Hammer, Automated Notifier, Party Line Phone

novice_research.name: Novice Research
novice_research.description: Novice Research is the first tier of research points used in research.

parallel_automation.name: Parallel Automation
parallel_automation.description: Multi-wire automation at a fraction of the space.
parallel_automation.summary: Parallel Automation research unlocks Automation Ribbon-related building.
parallel_automation.unlocks: Automation Ribbon, Automation Ribbon Bridge, Ribbon Writer, Ribbon Reader

pathogen_diagnostics.name: Pathogen Diagnostics
pathogen_diagnostics.description: Stop Germs at the source using special medical automation technology.
pathogen_diagnostics.unlocks: Gas Pipe Germ Sensor, Liquid Pipe Germ Sensor, Germ Sensor

personal_flight.name: Personal Flight
personal_flight.description: Give Duplicants the gift of a walk-free commute.
personal_flight.summary: The research node unlocks Jet Suits, Buildings which enable the use of Jet Suits, as well as some miscellaneous Rocketry-related buildings.
personal_flight.unlocks: Jet Suit=Jet Suit=Jet Suit Pattern, Jet Suit Checkpoint, Jet Suit Dock
personal_flight.unlocksSO: Jet Suit=Jet Suit=Jet Suit Pattern, Jet Suit Checkpoint, Jet Suit Dock, Large Liquid Cargo Tank

pharmacology.name: Pharmacology
pharmacology.description: Compound natural cures to fight the common Sicknesses that plague Duplicants.
pharmacology.unlocks: Apothecary, Gear Balm=Gear Balm=Gear Balm= Pattern

plastic_manufacturing.name: Plastic Manufacturing
plastic_manufacturing.description: Stable lightweight, durable. Plastics are useful for a wide array of applications.
plastic_manufacturing.summary: Plastic Manufacturing research unlocks the ability to create Plastic as well as the Oil Well, which can be a renewable source of Crude Oil, if set up correctly.

plumbing_research.name: Plumbing
plumbing_research.description: Rudimentary technologies for installing Liquid infrastructure.
plumbing_research.summary: Plumbing Research unlocks the basic Plumbing Buildings.
plumbing_research.unlocks: Liquid Pipe, Liquid Bridge, Liquid Pump, Liquid Vent

portable_gases.name: Portable Gases
portable_gases.description: Unlock technologies to easily move gases around your colony.
portable_gases.unlocks: Canister Filler, Canister Emptier, Oxygen Mask=Oxygen Mask=Oxygen Mask Pattern, Oxygen Mask Dock, Oxygen Mask Checkpoint, Oxylite Sconce

power_regulation.name: Power Regulation
power_regulation.description: Prevent wasted Power with improved electrical tools.
power_regulation.summary: Power Regulation is the first tier Power related Research. This research unlocks the Battery, the Switch and the Wire Bridge. Power Regulation also unlocks the second tier Research, Internal Combustion.
power_regulation.unlocks: Jumbo Battery, Switch, Wire Bridge, Compact Discharger

pressure_management.name: Pressure Management
pressure_management.description: Unlock technologies to manage colony pressure and atmosphere.
pressure_management.summary: Pressure Management research unlocks Buildings used for managing Gas and Liquid pressure.
pressure_management.unlocks: Liquid Valve, Gas Valve, Airflow Tile, Manual Airlock

radbolt_containment.name: Radbolt Containment
radbolt_containment.description: Build a quality cache of radbolts.
radbolt_containment.summary: Radbolt Containment is Spaced Out! exclusive research offering a long-term option for storing Radbolts.

radbolt_propulsion.name: Radbolt Propulsion
radbolt_propulsion.description: Radical technology to get you to the stars.
radbolt_propulsion.summary: Radbolt Propulsion Research unlocks Radbolt Engine, a powerful rocket engine.

radiation_protection.name: Radiation Protection
radiation_protection.description: Shield Duplicants from dangerous amounts of radiation.
radiation_protection.summary: Radiation Protection is Spaced Out! exclusive research unlocking harm-minimizing solutions to Radiation.
radiation_protection.unlocks: Lead Suit=Lead Suit=Lead Suit= Pattern, Lead Suit Checkpoint, Lead Suit Dock, Radbolt Sensor
radiation_protection.requires: More Materials Science Research, Micro-Targeted Medicine, Liquid-Based Refinement Processes

radiation_refinement.name: Radiation Refinement
radiation_refinement.summary: unlocks the ability to refine Uranium Ore and use it for electricity generation.
radiation_refinement.unlocks: Research Reactor, Uranium Centrifuge, Atomic Power Bank=Atomic Power Bank=Atomic Power Bank= Pattern
radiation_refinement.requires: Superheated Forging, Radbolt Containment, Radiation Protection

ranching_research.name: Ranching
ranching_research.description: Tame and care for wild critters.
ranching_research.summary: Ranching Research unlocks buildings that tame and care for wild critters.
ranching_research.unlocks: Grooming Station, Shearing Station, Critter Feeder, Fish Release, Fish Pick-Up, Fish Feeder, Critter Drop-Off, Critter Pick-Up

refined_renovations.name: Refined Renovations
refined_renovations.description: Improve base infrastructure with new objects crafted from Refined Metals.
refined_renovations.summary: Refined Renovations research unlocks the Plywood Press, Fire Pole and the Tempshift Plate. If the Spaced out DLC is installed it also unlocks the Ladder Bed.
refined_renovations.unlocks: Plywood Press, Fire Pole, Tempshift Plate
refined_renovations.unlocksSO: Plywood Press, Fire Pole, Tempshift Plate, Ladder Bed

renaissance_art.name: Renaissance Art
renaissance_art.description: The kind of art that culture legacies are made of.
renaissance_art.summary: research unlocks new buildings which provide Decor bonuses, which can be transformed by Duplicants possessing Decorating skills to boost their decor further (depending on skill level). These buildings take different form factors than their equivalents from prior research tiers.
renaissance_art.unlocks: Portrait Canvas, Marble Block, Fossil Block, Hanging Fossil Block

renewable_energy.name: Renewable Energy
renewable_energy.description: Clean, sustainable Power production that produces little to no waste.
renewable_energy.summary: Renewable Energy research unlocks the Sauna, Steam Turbine and the Solar Panel. It also unlocks the Steam Engine in Spaced Out!.
renewable_energy.unlocks: Steam Turbine, Solar Panel, Sauna, Insulated Conductive Wire, Insulated Conductive Wire Bridge
renewable_energy.unlocksSO: Steam Turbine, Solar Panel, Sauna, Insulated Conductive Wire, Insulated Conductive Wire Bridge, Steam Engine (Spaced Out)

robotic_tools.name: Robotic Tools
robotic_tools.description: The goal of every great civilization is to one day make itself obsolete.
robotic_tools.unlocksSO: Robo-Miner, Payload Opener, Robo-Pilot Module, Marine Drill

sanitation.name: Sanitation
sanitation.description: Make daily ablutions less of a hassle.
sanitation.summary: Sanitation research node unlocks Buildings used for keeping your Duplicants clean.
sanitation.unlocks: Lavatory, Sink, Shower, Mesh Tile, Gunk Extractor

sensitive_microimaging.name: Sensitive Microimaging
sensitive_microimaging.description: Computerized systems do the looking, so Duplicants don't have to.
sensitive_microimaging.unlocks: Cartographic Module, Automation Broadcaster, Automation Receiver

smart_home.name: Smart Home
smart_home.description: Switches that grant full control of building operations within the colony.
smart_home.summary: Smart Home research unlocks several basic Automation buildings.
smart_home.unlocks: Automation Overlay Icon=Automation Overlay, Signal Switch, Automation Wire, Automation Wire Bridge, Duplicant Motion Sensor

smart_storage.name: Smart Storage
smart_storage.description: Completely automate the storage of solid resources.
smart_storage.unlocks: Conveyor Overlay, Auto-Sweeper, Smart Storage Bin, Automatic Dispenser

smelting.name: Smelting
smelting.description: High temperatures facilitate the production of purer, special use metal resources.
smelting.summary: Smelting research unlocks the Metal Refinery and the Metal Tile.
smelting.unlocks: Metal Refinery, Metal Tile, Swimwear=Swimwear=Swimwear Pattern , Rubber Boots, Vulcanizer

solid_cargo.name: Solid Cargo
solid_cargo.description: Make extra use of journeys into space by mining and storing useful resources.

solid_control.name: Solid Control
solid_control.unlocks: Conveyor Shutoff, Conveyor Receptacle, Conveyor Meter
solid_control.unlocksSO: Conveyor Shutoff, Conveyor Receptacle, Conveyor Meter, Conveyor Receptacle Fitting, Conveyor Loader Fitting

solid_fuel_combustion.name: Solid Fuel Combustion
solid_fuel_combustion.unlocks: Solid Fuel Thruster, Mission Control Station

solid_management.name: Solid Management
solid_management.description: Make solid decisions in Solid sorting.
solid_management.unlocks: Solid Filter, Conveyor Rail Thermo Sensor, Conveyor Rail Element Sensor, Conveyor Rail Germ Sensor, Storage Tile
solid_management.unlocksSO: Solid Filter, Conveyor Rail Thermo Sensor, Conveyor Rail Element Sensor, Conveyor Rail Germ Sensor, Storage Tile, Large Cargo Bay

solid_transport.name: Solid Transport
solid_transport.description: Free Duplicants from the drudgery of day-to-day material deliveries with new methods of automation.
solid_transport.unlocks: Conveyor Loader, Conveyor Rail, Conveyor Bridge, Conveyor Chute
solid_transport.unlocksSO: Conveyor Loader, Conveyor Rail, Conveyor Bridge, Conveyor Chute, Cargo Bay, Solid Rocket Port Loader, Solid Rocket Port Unloader, Rocket Port Extension

sound_amplifiers.name: Sound Amplifiers
sound_amplifiers.description: Precise control of the audio spectrum allows Duplicants to get funky.
sound_amplifiers.unlocks: Smart Battery, Jukebot, Power Control Station, Power Bank Charger, Eco Power Bank=Eco Power Bank=Eco Power Bank Pattern

space_power.name: Space Power
space_power.unlocks: Battery Module, Solar Panel Module, Power Outlet Fitting

space_program.name: Space Program
space_program.description: The first steps in getting a Duplicant to space.
space_program.summary: Space Program Research unlocks buildings needed for launching a rocket.
space_program.unlocks: Rocket Platform, Solo Spacefarer Nosecone, Orbital Cargo Module, Rocket Control Station

superheated_forging.name: Superheated Forging
superheated_forging.description: Craft entirely new materials by harnessing the most extreme temperatures.
superheated_forging.unlocks: Glass Forge, Bunker Tile, Bunker Door, Geotuner
superheated_forging.unlocksSO: Glass Forge, Bunker Tile, Bunker Door, Geotuner, Gantry

temperature_modulation.name: Temperature Modulation
temperature_modulation.description: Precise Temperature altering technologies to keep my colony at the perfect Kelvin.
temperature_modulation.unlocks: Insulated Door, Ice-E Fan, Ice Maker, Ice Liquefier, Insulated Tile, Space Heater

textile_production.name: Textile Production
textile_production.description: Bring Duplicants the Morale boosting benefits of soft, cushy fabrics.

transit_tubes.name: Transit Tubes
transit_tubes.description: A wholly futuristic way to move Duplicants around the base.
transit_tubes.unlocks: Transit Tube Access, Transit Tube, Transit Tube Crossing, Vertical Wind Tunnel

unique_cargo.name: Unique Cargo
unique_cargo.description: Allow Duplicants to take their friends to see the stars... or simply bring souvenirs back from their travels.
unique_cargo.summary: research unlocks the two final cargo modules for Rockets in the base game. The Biological Cargo Bay functions like a normal cargo bay, but it can store and retrieve critters from celestial bodies. A Sight-Seeing Module allows for an "astronaut" to bring one other Duplicant along the space mission, giving the passenger to get a "Visited Space" buff among other benefits.

valve_miniaturization.name: Valve Miniaturization
valve_miniaturization.description: Smaller, more efficient pumps for those low-throughput situations.
valve_miniaturization.summary: Valve Minaturization research unlocks two low-power pumps.
valve_miniaturization.unlocks: Mini Liquid Pump, Mini Gas Pump, Mini Fridge

ventilation_research.name: Ventilation
ventilation_research.description: Rudimentary technologies for installing Gas infrastructure.
ventilation_research.summary: Ventilation Research unlocks the basic Ventilation Buildings.
ventilation_research.unlocks: Gas Pipe, Gas Bridge, Gas Pump, Gas Vent
